sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11765" key="a)peiro/tokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπειρό-τοκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not having brought forth,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παρθενίη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip. Sid.).</sense> </entryFree>
